## Summary
Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] I have run the test suite locally: $env:PYTHONPATH=./src; pytest -q
- [ ] Linting passes: ruff check .
- [ ] Type checks: mypy src (optional failures may be allowed)
- [ ] If code execution changes, I verified POLYMATH_ALLOW_CODE_EXECUTION behavior

## Additional notes
Add any additional context for reviewers.
